sections.lead: Kombi's technical SEO is surprisingly solid for a 2-page site. The gaps are in content volume and structured data.

findings.title: Valid SSL certificate
findings.detail: Site served over HTTPS with no mixed content warnings.

findings.title: Good meta title
findings.detail: "North Shore General Contractor - Kombi Homes" (44 chars). Clear, keyword-rich, proper length.

findings.title: Meta description present
findings.detail: "Kombi Construction is a residential design and construction company based in North Vancouver, BC" (96 chars).

findings.title: Single H1 tag
findings.detail: "KOMBI CONSTRUCTION". Clean heading hierarchy.

findings.title: Open Graph tags present
findings.detail: og:title and og:image found. Social sharing will display correctly.

findings.title: Canonical tag present
findings.detail: Self-referencing canonical. No duplicate content issues.

findings.title: Sitemap found
findings.detail: 2 URLs indexed at /sitemap_index.xml.

findings.title: Good server response
findings.detail: 541ms first byte. Clean, fast loading.

findings.title: No structured data (schema.org)
findings.detail: Zero JSON-LD markup. Google doesn't know Kombi is a builder, where you're based, what services you offer, or your 31-year track record. Add LocalBusiness and HomeBuilder schema.

findings.title: Only 2 pages in sitemap
findings.detail: Homepage and contact page. Every competitor has 10-50+ pages indexed. Each missing page is a missed search opportunity.

findings.title: No robots.txt customization
findings.detail: Default configuration. Not an issue now but should be reviewed as the site grows.

sections.headline_html:
Local visibility.
Can North Shore clients find you?
sections.lead: This is the biggest gap. Kombi is invisible in local search results, Google Maps, and the Local Pack for North Vancouver builder searches.

findings.title: No Google Business Profile detected
findings.detail: Cannot appear in Google Maps, Local Pack, or "near me" searches. This is the single highest-impact fix available. A verified GBP with photos and reviews would immediately improve visibility for "general contractor North Vancouver" searches.

findings.title: No LocalBusiness schema
findings.detail: Even without a GBP, schema markup would tell Google your NAP (name, address, phone), service area, and business type. Currently Google has to guess.

findings.title: Listed on Houzz
findings.detail: Active profile found. Good authoritative directory presence for design-build.

findings.title: BBB accredited with A+ rating
findings.detail: Strong trust signal. Excellent client reviews mentioning Brian and Ryan by name.

findings.title: Not found on HomeStars
findings.detail: Major Canadian home services directory. Missing a citation opportunity.

findings.title: Not found on CHBA member directory
findings.detail: Industry association listing would strengthen local authority and enable award submissions.

findings.title: NAP consistency unverified
findings.detail: Name, address, and phone should be identical across website footer, Houzz, BBB, and any other listings.

sections.lead: Here's how Kombi stacks up against other North Shore custom home builders and general contractors online.
The photography in the homepage carousel is quality work. But 12 images on a single page with no project context isn't a portfolio.

findings.title: 12 images on homepage
findings.detail: Good visual presence on the landing page. Carousel shows real craftsmanship.

findings.title: Alt text on 11 of 12 images
findings.detail: Near-perfect accessibility. Only 1 image missing alt text site-wide.

findings.title: No project pages or portfolio
findings.detail: Zero dedicated pages for individual projects. 31 years of custom homes, renovations, and complex builds with no visual documentation online.

findings.title: No before/after content
findings.detail: Renovation transformations are the highest-performing content in this market. No before/after documentation exists.

findings.title: No video content
findings.detail: No project films, reels, or walkthrough videos. Video is increasingly expected by homeowners evaluating builders.

findings.title: 160 total words across entire site
findings.detail: The homepage and contact page combined have less content than a single project page should. Google ranks pages based on content depth and relevance.

findings.title: No blog or journal
findings.detail: Regular content builds search authority. Competitors post monthly. Kombi has zero posts.

findings.title: No testimonials on site
findings.detail: Excellent BBB reviews (Ryan Heathfield praised by name) exist on third-party sites but aren't showcased on kombihomes.com.

findings.title: No service descriptions
findings.detail: Custom homes, renovations, structural concrete, decks, underpinning, these services aren't described anywhere on the site.

sections.lead: These are ordered by impact. The first three can be done in week one.

steps.title: Google Business Profile
steps.description: Create, verify, and optimize a GBP with photos, services, and service area. Immediate visibility in Google Maps and Local Pack for North Shore searches.

steps.title: Schema Markup
steps.description: Add LocalBusiness and HomeBuilder JSON-LD schema. Tell Google what Kombi is, where you're based, and what you do. 30-minute fix with massive SEO impact.

steps.title: Project Portfolio
steps.description: Build dedicated project pages for your best completed work. Each page is a new search entry point. Start with 3 projects and add one per month.

steps.title: Professional Photography
steps.description: Document current and upcoming projects with award-ready photography. Build the visual library that powers everything else, the portfolio, social media, awards, proposals.

steps.title: Content Strategy
steps.description: Monthly blog posts, project case studies, and social media content. Build the search authority and online presence that matches 31 years of craftsmanship.

insight.title: This Is Where a Creative Partner Comes In
insight.content_html: The audit findings above aren't a redesign job. They're a content gap. Kombi needs someone documenting every project, building the portfolio page by page, and fixing the local SEO foundations. That's exactly what the Creative Partner model delivers: professional photography, project pages, GBP setup, schema fixes, and a growing content library. All handled, so you can focus on building.
